languages.text: "Мы уйдем к звездам! Но что, что вы дадите нам там, за пределами этого мира, {name} фон Валанциус?!" {n}Голос Ведки срывается в хрип.{/n}
"We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Мы уйдем к звездам! Но что, что вы дадите нам там, за пределами этого мира, {name} фон Валанциус?!" {n}Голос Ведки срывается в хрип.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "We shall go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice breaks into a rasp.{/n}
"We shall go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice breaks into a rasp.{/n}
"We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}
"We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}
"We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}

languages.text: “我们会前往星辰！但在这个世界之外，您能给予我们什么，{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯？”{n}薇德卡的声音有些沙哑。{/n}
languages.original_text: "We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “我们会前往星辰！但在这个世界之外，您能给予我们什么，{name}·冯·瓦兰修斯？”{n}薇德卡的声音有些沙哑。{/n}

languages.text: "Yıldızlara gideceğiz! Fakat orada, bu dünyanın ötesinde bize ne sunacaksınız {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka'nın sesi çatallaşıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Yıldızlara gideceğiz! Fakat orada, bu dünyanın ötesinde bize ne sunacaksınız {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka'nın sesi çatallaşıyor.{/n}

languages.text: « Nous voyagerons jusqu'aux étoiles ! Mais qu'avez-vous à nous y offrir, par-delà ce monde, {name} von Valancius ? » {n}objecte Vedka.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Nous voyagerons jusqu'aux étoiles ! Mais qu'avez-vous à nous y offrir, par-delà ce monde, {name} von Valancius ? » {n}objecte Vedka.{/n}

languages.text: «¡Viajaremos a las estrellas! Pero ¿qué nos dará allí, más allá de este mundo, {name} von Valancius?». {n}La voz de Vedka se quiebra.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «¡Viajaremos a las estrellas! Pero ¿qué nos dará allí, más allá de este mundo, {name} von Valancius?». {n}La voz de Vedka se quiebra.{/n}

languages.text: "Wir werden zu den Sternen reisen! Aber was werdet Ihr uns dort geben, jenseits dieser Welt, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedkas Stimme überschlägt sich.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wir werden zu den Sternen reisen! Aber was werdet Ihr uns dort geben, jenseits dieser Welt, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedkas Stimme überschlägt sich.{/n}

languages.text: 「我々は星へ行く！だが、この世界を超えた星で、我々に何をくれる、{name}・フォン・ヴァランキウス？」{n}ヴェドカの声は震えた.{/n}
languages.original_text: "We will go to the stars! But what will you give us there, beyond this world, {name} von Valancius?" {n}Vedka's voice cracks.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 「我々は星へ行く！だが、この世界を超えた星で、我々に何をくれる、{name}・フォン・ヴァランキウス？」{n}ヴェドカの声は震えた.{/n}
